summary: Iter-80 Batch C (#7 admin manual wallet top-up UI, #8 per-mess revenue sparklines) fully validated end-to-end. Backend: 13/13 new pytest cases pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iter80_batchc.py — covers (a) metrics series lengths exactly == days for days=7/30/90, (b) total_revenue_series is element-wise sum of order+subscription series, (c) /api/franchise/me/metrics surfaces same fields, (d) POST /api/admin/users/{id}/wallet-adjust admin-only (non-admin 403, empty reason 400, zero-delta+zero-extend+zero-restore 400), (e) credit increases wallet & writes wallet_overrides row with admin_email+reason, (f) debit decreases wallet, (g) excessive debit floors at 0, (h) delta=0+extend_days=5+restore_meals=3 mutates only the subscription (no wallet change), (i) GET /api/admin/users/{id}/wallet-history returns {transactions, overrides} both sorted ts desc. Frontend (Playwright, 1280x900, admin@efoodcare.com cookie session): (1) /admin/wallet-topup — page title 'Manual wallet top-up' renders, search filter narrows the list from 100→5 when typing 'admin', clicking a user populates wallet-topup-form, wallet-topup-user-name and wallet-topup-current-balance correctly. (2) Quick chip ₹500 populates amount input, Apply button disabled without reason. After typing reason 'cash to manager' Apply enabled → click triggers toast 'Wallet adjusted — new balance ₹500' and history list adds '+₹500 cash to manager · by admin@efoodcare.com'. (3) Switching to wallet-direction-debit + amount 100 + reason 'test debit' → balance drops to ₹400 and history adds '−₹100 test debit'. (4) wallet-adv-toggle reveals wallet-extend-days and wallet-restore-meals inputs. (5) AdminLayout sidebar shows both 'Restaurant hours / capacity' and 'Manual wallet top-up' links. (6) /admin/messes/efoodcare-amravati/metrics — all 6 existing metric cards render, plus NEW metric-total-revenue-trend card with headline 'Total daily revenue · last 30d', ₹ amount, 'Peak day' label, area-style revenue-area-spark SVG. metric-revenue-sub and metric-revenue-ord both now contain an embedded mini sparkline SVG (2 svgs per card: icon + spark). 7d/30d/90d window toggle correctly rescales spark — path segments 9 (7d) vs 92 (90d). Cleanup: ephemeral FE test user u_test_fe_z7y9we0v + its 2 wallet_transactions + 2 wallet_overrides + admin FE session deleted. restaurant_hours doc untouched (still null → defaults to mode='auto').
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:_mess_metrics — sub_in_window query uses `start_date: {$gte: since}` (ISO string compare). Works because iso() always emits RFC3339 UTC; if any legacy sub has a non-UTC start_date string the bucket will silently miss it. Consider migrating start_date to datetime objects in Mongo.

server.py:_mess_metrics — `total_revenue_series = [order[i]+sub[i] for i in range(max(len(order), len(sub)))]`. Today both lists are always == days, so this is safe. But if either branch returns an empty list (e.g. days=0 which is clamped to 1 above), the total list would also be empty without explicit padding. Minor robustness nit.

server.py admin_wallet_adjust — the `if not sub and (payload.delta or payload.extend_days or payload.restore_meals): pass` branch is a no-op comment. Should be removed for clarity or replaced with a logger.warning so an admin who tries to extend_days/restore_meals on a user with no active sub still gets visible feedback (today the endpoint just silently skips sub_updates and returns ok=true).

server.py admin_wallet_adjust — wallet_overrides audit row currently does NOT include `target_phone` even though it stores target_email. For admins searching the audit log by phone (which is the primary user-facing identifier in this app) it would be useful. Minor.
AdminWalletTopup.jsx — history list shows '+₹500 ... by admin@efoodcare.com' but no way to scroll past the latest 200 overrides. For high-volume support this needs pagination. Non-blocking for MVP.

AdminMessMetrics.jsx — mini sparklines inside metric-revenue-sub / metric-revenue-ord are rendered as <svg> without aria-label / role='img'. Screen-reader users get no signal. Add aria-label='30-day revenue trend' or similar.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3 UI checkpoints: wallet-topup credit+debit+history flow, advanced toggle, metrics page with new trend card + mini sparks + window toggle)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@efoodcare.com (user_id=u_b4e014b5e2, phone=9000000000) already promoted to role=admin in DB. Auth via cookie session_token (axios withCredentials=true). For repeat runs, insert a fresh session into user_sessions for the admin user — DO NOT rely on dev_otp endpoint (rate-limited 10/10min).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 ephemeral admin session ('fe_iter80_qwxc82oqzxq') + 1 ephemeral subscriber user (u_test_fe_z7y9we0v, phone +919555000111). Pytest fixtures additionally created 1 short-lived TEST subscriber + active subscription + non-admin user; all torn down by fixture finalisers. All adjusted via wallet-adjust audit trail. ALL cleaned up at end of run — verified residual TEST_ users=0 in Mongo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter80_batchc.py covers Batch C #7 + #8. Backend metrics endpoint returns: order_revenue_series, subscription_revenue_series, total_revenue_series (all length==days, 0-padded). Wallet-adjust audit rows go into db.wallet_overrides ({audit_id, ts, admin_email, target_user_id, target_email, delta, extend_days, restore_meals, reason, before, after}). Frontend testids confirmed working: wallet-topup-search, wallet-topup-userlist, wallet-topup-form, wallet-topup-user-name, wallet-topup-current-balance, wallet-amount-quick-{100,500,1000,2500}, wallet-amount-input, wallet-reason-input, wallet-direction-credit, wallet-direction-debit, wallet-adv-toggle, wallet-extend-days, wallet-restore-meals, wallet-apply-button, wallet-history-list. Metrics testids: metric-total-revenue-trend, revenue-area-spark; embedded svgs inside metric-revenue-sub / metric-revenue-ord. Window toggle is buttons with literal text '7d' / '30d' / '90d' (no data-testid on toggles themselves — consider adding metrics-window-{7,30,90} in a follow-up).
rca of the issue: No issues found. All Batch C #7 and #8 acceptance criteria pass cleanly. Note for main agent: the metrics window-toggle buttons are selected via :has-text — consider adding data-testid='metric-window-{7d,30d,90d}' for stable testing. Also wallet history list lacks pagination beyond 200 rows — fine for current scale but flag for the next iteration.
